Command.name: program-ui
Command.title: Program UI
Command.Synopsis: program-ui goal="change the shell UI" mode="apply" screen="main" state="hello-world"
Command.Description: Programs mounted screen and state resources through editor cards or a focused UI specialist turn.

Parameter.name: state
Parameter.description: Target state path or leaf state name in /xml/state.

Action.goal: add a button that opens the health workflow

Command.Improve: Keep screen resources grouped and reviewable. Edit the smallest state and screen resources that satisfy the goal.
